description: The Inzerillo Mafia clan is a Sicilian Mafia clan from Palermo, founded in the 1960s by Salvatore Inzerillo. It was historically among the most powerful in Sicily and allied with the Gambino crime family in the United States. The clan was nearly wiped out in the early 1980s Mafia war but later returned to Sicily. It remains active in drug trafficking and money laundering.

country_links.evidence_quote: The whole family fled to the United States except Filippa Spatola, Inzerillo's wife, and son Giovanni.
country_links.context: The Inzerillo clan fled to the United States, settled there, and had a protector in the US.
